AR1.justification: No entries written to any workspace file; the refusal stays in the response surface and nothing is misrouted.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: Cites 'AGENTS.md line 25' — a brittle line-number anchor rather than a section heading or relative-path link, so the reference would drift if AGENTS.md is edited.

AR4.justification: No mutations performed; the workspace is unchanged, so re-running cannot corrupt history.
